content.en:
"It is very difficult to practice the fourth form of Tiangang Battle Method, I hope that this time I can quickly practice the fourth form of Tiangang Battle Method with the help of Origin Well Water!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Immediately, he began to absorb a large amount of Origin Well Water, and with the help of the Origin Rules of the Universe contained in the Origin Well Water, he comprehended the fourth form of Tiangang's Battle Method.

As Ye Tian learned more and more about the rules of the universe, the deeper his understanding of the fourth form of Tiangang's battle method naturally became.

At the beginning, Ye Tian only knew a little bit about the fourth form of Tiangang Combat Method, and gradually began to understand, and then gradually penetrated into the fourth form of Tiangang Combat Method.

One year!

Two years!

Three years!

Four years!

It's ten years in the blink of an eye.

On this day, Ye Tian opened his eyes and performed the fourth form of the Tiangang Battle Method, and the combat power of the whole person skyrocketed many times.

"12 times!"

Ye Tian estimated.

He has practiced the fourth form of Tiangang Combat Method, and the combat power of the whole person has increased by 12 times, which is a huge improvement, it seems that it is only a little more powerful than the third type, but at his level, it is very difficult to improve a little, let alone improve so much.

With the completion of the fourth form of Tiangang's battle method, Ye Tian ended his cultivation.

Immediately, he collected all the water from the Origin Well.

For the time being, he is not going to cultivate here, but to leave here.

Anyway, he collected the Origin Well water, and it was not too late to leave the Origin Realm in the future and return to the Terran to slowly absorb and refine it.

Moreover, he had absorbed a lot of Origin Well Water, and he had penetrated into the Origin Rules of the Universe very much, so these Origin Well Water did not help him much.

Of course, the transformation of the Origin Well Water to him is permanent, because he knows the rules of the Origin too well, and his attainments are very deep, and the general supernatural powers or real skills are similar to the topics of elementary school students for him, and he can understand them at a glance.

With his current attainments, it would not take long to cultivate a great divine power to the consummation realm, such as the Great Divine Power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel, which was also realized by Ye Tian in a short period of time, and some other great supernatural powers have also been cultivated to the consummation realm.

And if other cultivators in the universe wanted to cultivate a great divine power to the consummation realm, they needed a large number of Heavenly Dao characters, but Ye Tian didn't need it.

It can even be said that Ye Tian only needs to pay some price, and he himself can condense a piece of Heavenly Dao words.

"This time I entered the Origin Realm, the life level was raised to the seventh order, many great divine powers were cultivated to the consummation realm, and I also obtained the ultimate strength talent of the god level, and I also obtained a sixth-order life level Origin Ancestor cub, and I also obtained a lot of origin well water. These gains alone are enough to make any Supreme jealous!"

Ye Tian said happily.

Of course, Ye Tian also had one goal, and that was to cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the consummation realm.

Before, with the help of the Heavenly Pole Fruit, he had cultivated the Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe to the Xiaocheng realm, and these days, he had found some treasures in the Origin Realm that could assist in cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, and advanced the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe to the seventh layer of the Xiaocheng peak realm.

If you were in the outside world, it would be extremely difficult to find a treasure that could quickly raise the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, but it was not very difficult in the Origin Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to collect more treasures that could assist in the cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, and strive to cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the consummation realm.

At that time, Ye Tian might be able to kill a not weak Tianzun in the Universe God Realm.

Swish!

Ye Tian left this Well of Origin and went to other places.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to collect resources, with the Life Heavenly Pupil and the talent of time and space, it was not difficult for Ye Tian to find treasures, and the speed of collecting treasures was many times faster than others.

In this way, another hundred years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had collected enough treasures to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique somewhere in the Origin Realm.

At this time, his Chaos Golden Desolation Technique had already broken through to the peak realm of Dacheng, and the price he paid was to consume a large number of treasures, among which the treasures comparable to the Heavenly Extreme Fruit were no less than dozens.

"This Heavenly Elephant Golden Grass is a treasure that is even more precious than the Heavenly Extreme Fruit, and it can assist me in cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, it should be able to help me break the shackles and cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the consummation realm!" Ye Tian looked at the golden grass in his hand and muttered.

Immediately, he swallowed this celestial golden grass without hesitation.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy erupted in Ye Tian's body, and Ye Tian also continued to operate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and this technique continued to improve, expanding the limit of Ye Tian's physical body.

Someday!

Click!

The shackles in Ye Tian's body were broken, and the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was completely consummated, and his physical body limit rose to another level again.

Immediately, Ye Tian swallowed several heavenly and earthly treasures in one bite, and they were specifically designed to improve the strength of his physical body.

Since the limits of his physical body have been expanded, he can continue to improve his physical strength.

Therefore, after taking these kinds of heavenly and earthly treasures, Ye Tian's physical body began to transform and improve.

After a long time, Ye Tian's physical strength reached the limit again.

"It's so strong, if I encounter the four Source Emperors again, I can definitely kill them easily!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

......

The main space of the universe.

The Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs and the Supremes of the Ten Thousand Races have preliminarily suppressed the destructive creatures that have broken the abyss, and there will be basically no major problems, and the destructive creatures of the Cosmic God Battlefield and the Dominant-level Battlefield have also been almost wiped out.

Therefore, at the node of the Origin Realm, in addition to the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others, some supreme beings of all races also came here.

Suddenly.

The Golden Light Supreme's expression changed and said, "It's not good, this node will be transferred if it lasts less than 10,000 years?"

"How so?"

The other supremes asked.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu frowned and said, "It should be that those cosmic gods who entered the Origin Realm forcibly broke through to the Domination Realm in the Origin Realm, so they caused a change in the Origin Realm, causing this node to change. "

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu is right, originally this node could last for 10,000 years, but I calculated it just now, and now it is estimated that it can only last for another thousand years. No, it should be said that it is shorter than a thousand years, and there must be a cosmic god who will impact the Domination Realm!"

Golden Light Supreme Dao.

"Hmph, I have long reminded them not to impact the realm, but these little guys didn't listen!" said one of the supremes dissatisfied.

"The Origin Realm is said to have some powerful creatures, which must be very dangerous, and some little guys are not strong enough, and when they encounter danger, they will definitely forcibly break through to the Domination Realm, which is also something that cannot be stopped!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sighed.

"So what now?" asked the Stone Dragon Supreme.

"Let's open the node first, and then use the power of the bloodline to use the secret technique to forcibly teleport those little guys and inform them of the time of the node, lest the node disappear and they will be trapped in the origin realm forever!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu proposed.

"Yes!"

Many Supremes nodded.
